market: Global markets face significant downturn amid US-Iran geopolitical tensions and surging oil prices (>$100/bbl). Nasdaq has entered correction territory as investors rotate out of AI hyperscalers. Recession probability is estimated at 49% with inflation concerns dampening rate cut expectations.
art: Art market remains resilient at the high end, with recent Hong Kong auctions showing record-breaking results for Joan Mitchell and Mark Rothko. A distinct 2026 trend is emerging: collectors are favoring 'human hand' craftsmanship over AI-generated perfection.
